semantic.role: CLI command adapter for configuration management within the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the command interface for configuration operations via ExecuteConfigCommandOptions interface.
Parses and validates configuration keys against the supported schema (e.g., 'llm.provider', 'llm.model').
Delegates configuration retrieval and mutation to the Config service (getPreCommitResolution, getHookSyncMode, getSupportedValue, setSupportedValue).
Formats and outputs configuration values to the console for user feedback using CLI utilities.
outOfScope: Implementing configuration storage or business logic (delegated to Config service).
Directly managing pipeline execution or persistence operations.
Providing interactive user interfaces beyond console output.
invariants: Must remain a thin adapter, only handling command-line argument parsing, validation, and output formatting.
Must delegate all configuration state operations to the Config service.
Must not contain business logic for configuration resolution or persistence.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Separation of concerns: CLI modules serve as entrypoints and adapters, keeping core logic in services.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Modularize CLI and decouple core infra services, aligning with keeping CLI thin.
